title: Fix remote board cloud sync drift
description:
Fix three remote board sync bugs:
- restore or re-request tick state after ProjectRoom hibernation
- make sync_full authoritative so removed ticks disappear remotely
- align cloud blocker handling with local board semantics for missing blockers

Acceptance:
- remote board reconnect after DO wake shows full tick set
- sync_full removes stale remote-only ticks
- tasks with missing blockers match local board columning
notes:
2026-03-21 17:02 - Implementing cloud sync fixes for DO wakeup, authoritative full sync, and remote blocker semantics.
2026-03-21 17:11 - Implemented ProjectRoom rehydration requests, authoritative sync_full replacement, cloud request_sync handling, and blocker parity fixes. Verified with go test ./internal/tickboard/cloud ./internal/tickboard/server, pnpm exec vitest run test/project-room-sync.test.ts, and pnpm exec vitest run src/comms/cloud-unit.test.ts.
